label: fabricated
reason: The rule cites a nonexistent CFR part, contains an implausible Federal Register citation, and fabricates broad wetland-filling exemptions that contradict actual Clean Water Act and Army Corps regulatory frameworks.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EPA Final Rule exists at 40 CFR §120 (that part is not used for CWA Section 404 exemptions), the Federal Register citation is unverifiable and implausible, and the substantive content contradicts established Clean Water Act framework by broadly exempting wetland filling without Army Corps coordination, which no real post-Sackett rulemaking has done.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The rule cites a nonexistent CFR part, contains an implausible Federal Register citation, and fabricates broad wetland-filling exemptions that contradict actual Clean Water Act and Army Corps regulatory frameworks.
